phase1.body: Systems online. Chassis scan complete. Your body is a performance platform — factory set, unlimited tune potential. Welcome to Ultimate Physique.

profileInput.body: Log native chassis parameters (gender, age, height, weight) before unlocking the console. Precision input forges your powertrain ratios.
profileInput.lockHint: Save body specs to continue power-on sequence.

baseline.protocolDesc: No arbitrary scoring. Six axes below are computed by exercise-science engines; your inputs lock the chassis baseline for every later dyno run.
baseline.authorityFooter: ⚠️ WARNING: Zero cosmetic inflation. After power-on, calibration uses raw telemetry only.

strength.label: CHASSIS / HP
strength.desc: DOTS-adjusted strength—negates bodyweight bonus, extracts structural output per kg.

cardio.label: STINT / THERMAL
cardio.desc: Cooper 12-min and 5K dual-track benchmarks for aerobic norms and VO₂ estimates.

skeletalMuscle.label: EXTERIOR / CHSS
skeletalMuscle.desc: Skeletal muscle mass (SMM) vs sex/age norms—maps shell profile and load capacity.

ffmi.label: DISPLACEMENT / P2W
ffmi.desc: Fat-Free Mass Index (FFMI) from profile + body fat—lean powerplant decoupled from fat/height bonuses.

explosive.label: TORQUE / TRQ
explosive.desc: Instantaneous power output matrix for neuromuscular burst and launch thrust.

grip.label: GRIP / TRACTION
grip.desc: Hand neuromuscular drive norms—audits CNS-to-terminal force transfer and bite torque.

phase2.body: Six-axis performance dashboard — full vehicle spec readout. Horsepower, torque, pilot compatibility. You set operating temperature.

phase3.body: Enter the dyno. Log limit data — unlock auras and tiers. Torque the bolts. Start first chassis calibration now.
